{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager / Content Creator",
  "description": "EnnyMax Gadgets is a technology and mobile device retail company located at Capital Mall, Lekki, Lagos. We specialize in the sales of smartphones, accessories, gadgets, and other consumer electronics from leading global brands. Our commitment is to provide customers with quality products, excellent customer service, and reliable after-sales support.

At EnnyMax Gadgets, we strive to make technology accessible by offering a wide range of innovative devices that meet the needs of individuals and businesses. We foster a customer-focused, dynamic, and growth-driven work environment where employees are encouraged to develop their skills, contribute ideas, and build rewarding careers in the technology retail industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager / Content Creator

Job Location: Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Part-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a creative, innovative, and results-driven Social Media Manager / Content Creator to manage our online presence and create engaging content that promotes our products, brand, and customer engagement.
	The ideal candidate should be passionate about digital marketing, content creation, and social media trends.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement social media strategies to increase brand awareness and engagement.
	Create high-quality content, including photos, videos, graphics, and captions for social media platforms.
	Manage and grow the company&rsquo;s social media accounts.
	Plan and maintain a content calendar.
	Monitor social media trends and incorporate relevant ideas into content.
	Engage with followers, respond to messages and comments, and build an online community.
	Track and analyze social media performance and provide regular reports.
	Collaborate with the sales and marketing team to promote products and campaigns.
	Cover in-store activities, product launches, and promotional events.


Education &amp; Experience


	Minimum of OND, HND, or Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Media Studies, Public Relations, or a related field.
	At least 1 year of experience in social media management, content creation, or digital marketing.
	A portfolio of previous social media work or content samples is an added advantage.


Required Skills:


	Strong content creation and storytelling skills.
	Proficiency in social media platforms such as Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, X, and LinkedIn.
	Basic graphic design and video editing skills.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Creativity and attention to detail.
	Knowledge of social media analytics and digital marketing tools.


Other Requirements:


	Must be creative, proactive, and self-motivated.
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.
	Strong understanding of current social media trends.
	Must be willing to work on-site in Lekki, Lagos.
	Experience in the technology, gadgets, or retail industry is an added advantage.


Remuneration


	Competitive salary;&nbsp; N80,000 - N100,000 per month.&nbsp;
	Performance-based incentives.
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, portfolio, and a brief cover letter to: janejoseph156@yahoo.com using &ldquo;Application for Social Media Manager / Content Creator&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-19",

Social Media Manager / Content Creator Job at EnnyMax Gadgets




        
    

        
        EnnyMax Gadgets is a technology and mobile device retail company located at Capital Mall, Lekki, Lagos. We specialize in the sales of smartphones, accessories, gadgets, and other consumer electronics from leading global brands. Our commitment is to provide customers with quality products, excellent customer service, and reliable after-sales support.

At EnnyMax Gadgets, we strive to make technology accessible by offering a wide range of innovative devices that meet the needs of individuals and businesses. We foster a customer-focused, dynamic, and growth-driven work environment where employees are encouraged to develop their skills, contribute ideas, and build rewarding careers in the technology retail industry.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager / Content Creator

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Part-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a creative, innovative, and results-driven Social Media Manager / Content Creator to manage our online presence and create engaging content that promotes our products, brand, and customer engagement.
	The ideal candidate should be passionate about digital marketing, content creation, and social media trends.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement social media strategies to increase brand awareness and engagement.
	Create high-quality content, including photos, videos, graphics, and captions for social media platforms.
	Manage and grow the company’s social media accounts.
	Plan and maintain a content calendar.
	Monitor social media trends and incorporate relevant ideas into content.
	Engage with followers, respond to messages and comments, and build an online community.
	Track and analyze social media performance and provide regular reports.
	Collaborate with the sales and marketing team to promote products and campaigns.
	Cover in-store activities, product launches, and promotional events.


Education & Experience


	Minimum of OND, HND, or Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Media Studies, Public Relations, or a related field.
	At least 1 year of experience in social media management, content creation, or digital marketing.
	A portfolio of previous social media work or content samples is an added advantage.


Required Skills:


	Strong content creation and storytelling skills.
	Proficiency in social media platforms such as Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, X, and LinkedIn.
	Basic graphic design and video editing skills.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Creativity and attention to detail.
	Knowledge of social media analytics and digital marketing tools.


Other Requirements:


	Must be creative, proactive, and self-motivated.
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.
	Strong understanding of current social media trends.
	Must be willing to work on-site in Lekki, Lagos.
	Experience in the technology, gadgets, or retail industry is an added advantage.


Remuneration


	Competitive salary;  N80,000 - N100,000 per month. 
	Performance-based incentives.
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development.


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, portfolio, and a brief cover letter to: [email protected] using “Application for Social Media Manager / Content Creator” as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Officer",
  "description": "Ablaze Consultancy is a dynamic and results-driven firm specializing in recruitment, consulting, and leadership training. We are committed to helping organizations build strong teams by connecting them with top talent and providing strategic business solutions that drive growth and excellence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Consultancy Ablaze is seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Procurement Officer to manage the sourcing and procurement of goods and services.
	The successful candidate will ensure cost-effective purchasing while maintaining quality standards and supplier relationships.


Responsibilities


	Source and evaluate suppliers and vendors.
	Prepare purchase orders and procurement documentation.
	Negotiate prices and contract terms with suppliers.
	Monitor inventory levels and procurement needs.
	Maintain accurate procurement records.
	Ensure timely delivery of goods and services.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND, NCE, HND, or Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree.
	Strong negotiation and communication skills.
	Good organizational and analytical abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.
	Previous procurement or purchasing experience is an added advantage.


Salary
N150,000 - 220,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified applicants should send their CV to: consultancyablaze@gmail.com using &quot;Application for Procurement Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Procurement Officer Job at Ablaze Consultancy




        
    

        
        Ablaze Consultancy is a dynamic and results-driven firm specializing in recruitment, consulting, and leadership training. We are committed to helping organizations build strong teams by connecting them with top talent and providing strategic business solutions that drive growth and excellence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Consultancy Ablaze is seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Procurement Officer to manage the sourcing and procurement of goods and services.
	The successful candidate will ensure cost-effective purchasing while maintaining quality standards and supplier relationships.


Responsibilities


	Source and evaluate suppliers and vendors.
	Prepare purchase orders and procurement documentation.
	Negotiate prices and contract terms with suppliers.
	Monitor inventory levels and procurement needs.
	Maintain accurate procurement records.
	Ensure timely delivery of goods and services.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND, NCE, HND, or Bachelor’s Degree.
	Strong negotiation and communication skills.
	Good organizational and analytical abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.
	Previous procurement or purchasing experience is an added advantage.


Salary
N150,000 - 220,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified applicants should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Application for Procurement Officer" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Marketing Manager - Digital & Offline Job at ASA Security Limited




        
    

        
        ASA Security Limited is a Nigerian limited liability company registered in Nigeria for the provision of advanced security technology services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Manager - Digital & Offline

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Plan and execute campaigns across social media, search, display, website, and messaging platforms.

	Leadership & Budgeting: work with internal teams, freelancers, and agencies. Plan and manage budgets.
	Monitor market trends and competitor activity, reporting insights to senior management.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related field

	Excellent collaboration, leadership, communication, and project management skills

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	An Account and Inventory Officer bridges the gap between finance and supply chain.
	They are responsible for managing physical stock, tracking stock movements, and reconciling those quantities with financial records to ensure accurate valuation, minimize financial discrepancies, and optimize inventory costs.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to: hr@troopharm.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Personal Assistant",
  "description": "Ren San &amp; Co. is a business support and full-service brand strategy firm. Our purpose is to help clients achieve their goals by developing and growing their brand, project, or event. We think of ourselves as more than just service providers, we are an extension of their team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Personal Assistant (PA) will provide comprehensive administrative, organisational, and personal support to the Principal.
	This role combines professional office assistance with personal and lifestyle management to ensure the smooth running of both work-related and personal activities.
	The PA will be responsible for managing schedules, coordinating communications, handling personal errands, and ensuring that daily priorities are effectively organised and executed.
	This position requires a highly proactive, dependable, and organised individual who can multitask, show initiative, and maintain professionalism and confidentiality at all times.


Key Responsibilities
Administrative and Executive Support:


	Manage the Principal&rsquo;s daily calendar, appointments, meetings, and travel arrangements.
	Screen and manage emails, phone calls, and correspondence on behalf of the Principal.
	Prepare reports, presentations, letters, and other official documents as required.
	Organise meetings, take minutes, and ensure proper follow-up on action points.
	Maintain an efficient filing and documentation system (both digital and physical).
	Handle sensitive and confidential information with discretion.


Personal Assistance and Errands:


	Run personal errands such as shopping, banking, pickups, and deliveries.
	Purchase household and personal items as required.
	Coordinate home maintenance, vendors, and service providers.
	Handle bill payments, renewals, and other personal administrative tasks.
	Manage appointments such as medical visits, salon bookings, or family-related schedules.
	Provide general day-to-day personal support to reduce the Principal&rsquo;s workload.


Communication and Stakeholder Engagement:


	Serve as the first point of contact for the Principal&rsquo;s office.
	Draft and respond to official correspondence as directed.
	Coordinate communication between the Principal and staff, clients, or partners.
	Represent the Principal professionally in interactions with stakeholders when required.


Operational Effectiveness:


	Anticipate the needs of the Principal and take initiative to resolve issues.
	Ensure smooth daily operations by identifying gaps and proposing practical solutions.
	Maintain high standards of organisation, professionalism, and efficiency.
	Provide regular updates on tasks, schedules, and pending activities.


Performance Expectations


	Efficient management of the Principal&rsquo;s schedule and priorities.
	Timely completion of all assigned tasks and responsibilities.
	Accurate documentation and follow-up on action items.
	Professional representation of the Principal at all times.
	Demonstrated reliability, initiative, and commitment to excellence.


Qualifications and Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Communication, Social Sciences, or a related field.
	2 - 4 years of experience as a Personal Assistant, Executive Assistant, or similar role.
	Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and digital communication tools.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Proven ability to manage multiple priorities and work under pressure.


Key Skills and Attributes:


	Highly organised and detail-oriented.
	Proactive, resourceful, and solutions-driven.
	Strong time management and multitasking abilities.
	Professional, discreet, and trustworthy.
	Excellent interpersonal and communication skills.
	Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
	Strong sense of responsibility and accountability.


Working Conditions:


	Full-time role based in Abuja.
	May require occasional travel and extended working hours.
	A fast-paced work environment that requires flexibility and adaptability.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: ryanrensan@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Personal Assistant (PA) will provide comprehensive administrative, organisational, and personal support to the Principal.
	This role combines professional office assistance with personal and lifestyle management to ensure the smooth running of both work-related and personal activities.
	The PA will be responsible for managing schedules, coordinating communications, handling personal errands, and ensuring that daily priorities are effectively organised and executed.
	This position requires a highly proactive, dependable, and organised individual who can multitask, show initiative, and maintain professionalism and confidentiality at all times.


Key Responsibilities
Administrative and Executive Support:


	Manage the Principal’s daily calendar, appointments, meetings, and travel arrangements.
	Screen and manage emails, phone calls, and correspondence on behalf of the Principal.
	Prepare reports, presentations, letters, and other official documents as required.
	Organise meetings, take minutes, and ensure proper follow-up on action points.
	Maintain an efficient filing and documentation system (both digital and physical).
	Handle sensitive and confidential information with discretion.


Personal Assistance and Errands:


	Run personal errands such as shopping, banking, pickups, and deliveries.
	Purchase household and personal items as required.
	Coordinate home maintenance, vendors, and service providers.
	Handle bill payments, renewals, and other personal administrative tasks.
	Manage appointments such as medical visits, salon bookings, or family-related schedules.
	Provide general day-to-day personal support to reduce the Principal’s workload.


Communication and Stakeholder Engagement:


	Serve as the first point of contact for the Principal’s office.
	Draft and respond to official correspondence as directed.
	Coordinate communication between the Principal and staff, clients, or partners.
	Represent the Principal professionally in interactions with stakeholders when required.


Operational Effectiveness:


	Anticipate the needs of the Principal and take initiative to resolve issues.
	Ensure smooth daily operations by identifying gaps and proposing practical solutions.
	Maintain high standards of organisation, professionalism, and efficiency.
	Provide regular updates on tasks, schedules, and pending activities.


Performance Expectations


	Efficient management of the Principal’s schedule and priorities.
	Timely completion of all assigned tasks and responsibilities.
	Accurate documentation and follow-up on action items.
	Professional representation of the Principal at all times.
	Demonstrated reliability, initiative, and commitment to excellence.


Qualifications and Experience


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Communication, Social Sciences, or a related field.
	2 - 4 years of experience as a Personal Assistant, Executive Assistant, or similar role.
	Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and digital communication tools.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Proven ability to manage multiple priorities and work under pressure.


Key Skills and Attributes:


	Highly organised and detail-oriented.
	Proactive, resourceful, and solutions-driven.
	Strong time management and multitasking abilities.
	Professional, discreet, and trustworthy.
	Excellent interpersonal and communication skills.
	Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
	Strong sense of responsibility and accountability.


Working Conditions:


	Full-time role based in Abuja.
	May require occasional travel and extended working hours.
	A fast-paced work environment that requires flexibility and adaptability.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
